metadata.description: Reusable mobile (Android/iOS) agent pipeline: spec-bundle creator (/mp-spec) and per-project dev orchestrator (/mp). One canonical source in templates/, emitted into these plugin trees by lib/build-marketplace.sh.

plugins.name: mp-spec
plugins.description: Universal-intake spec bundle creator for mobile apps: EARS requirements, user stories, Gherkin acceptance criteria, platform-neutral design + appendix, NFR/a11y/security/analytics/i18n/risk/estimate, and a traceability matrix — validated by an evaluator-optimizer critic with two human gates. Greenfield interview or clone from screenshots + Google Play + optional APK.

plugins.name: mp-dev
plugins.description: Per-project mobile dev orchestrator (/mp) + specialist agents (architect, planner, developer, reviewer, tester, runner, verifier, docs, intake, knowledge) for Android/iOS. Generic agent bodies read project specifics from .claude/mp/config.json + CLAUDE.md + optional .claude/mp/extras/*.md.
